name: fun.board
description:
Build games for Board, the tabletop gaming platform with physical piece tracking. Includes APIs for touch and piece input, multiplayer sessions, save games, and player profiles.

Developer FAQ (READ THIS FIRST): https://docs.dev.board.fun/faq
Developer Docs: https://docs.dev.board.fun/
Developer Portal: https://dev.board.fun/
Developer Discord: https://discord.gg/KccHAYgykD

samples.description: Sample scene illustrating how to read input from Board
